query: Alien Romulus sequel Predator appearance script rumors April 2025

{"query":"Alien Romulus sequel Predator appearance script rumors April 2025","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1338,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.avpgalaxy.net/2025/04/25/rumor-a-predator-will-appear-in-the-alien-romulus-sequel/","title":"[Rumor] A Predator Will Appear in the Alien: Romulus Sequel - Alien vs. Predator Galaxy","content":"Entertainment journalist Jeff Sneider recently posted that he’s hearing we’ll be seeing a Predator appear in the in-development sequel for Alien: Romulus.
The director of Alien: Romulus, Fede Álvarez has previously spoken about being open to an eventual AVP, one he has suggested he could co direct with Dan Trachtenberg.
Sneider previously was the first to drop the name for upcoming Predator animated anthology, Predator: Killer of Killers, which ended up being accurate."},{"url":"https://weylanduplink.com/news/alien-romulus-2-set-begin-filming-this-fall-rumored-to-new-alien-vs-predator-crossover","title":"Alien: Romulus 2 set to begin filming this Fall (rumored to be new Alien vs. Predator crossover)! | Alien: Romulus 2 News","content":"Back in April, rumors began circulating that the Alien: Romulus sequel would feature a de-aged Sigourney Weaver to reprise the Ellen Ripley character and that the script included a crossover with Predator!
Predator reboot and we know the big wigs at 20th Century Studios and Disney are very interested in the idea after Prey and Romulus' success.
Production was originally supposed to have begun in October of 2025 but little news has surfaced.
You can also get notified of new updates by following Weyland Uplink on X, on Instagram and liking our Facebook page!"},{"url":"https://www.yahoo.com/entertainment/articles/alien-romulus-sequel-rumored-predator-061644578.html","title":"Alien: Romulus Sequel Rumored to Have a Predator in It","content":"Rumors suggest that the sequel to Alien: Romulus may feature a Predator, hinting at a potential crossover between the two franchises.
Rumors are circulating that the sequel to Fede Álvarez's Alien: Romulus will lead to another Predator vs.
Journalist and industry scooper Jeff Sneider revealed on The Hot Mic podcast (at 44:22) that he had been "told that the script for Fede Álvarez's follow-up to Alien: Romulus features a Predator."
Like Romulus, 2022's Prey was a critical and commercial success and breathed new life into the franchise it was part of.
Last year, Álvarez stated that he would be interested in co-directing a crossover project with Trachtenberg.
Steve Asbell of 20th Century Studios told The Hollywood Reporter in October 2024 that there would "probably" be another crossover, but added that it wouldn't be in a way that fans might think."},{"url":"https://www.budapestreporter.com/rumor-predator-could-appear-in-alien-romulus-sequel/","title":"Rumor: Predator Could Appear in Alien: Romulus Sequel | Budapest Reporter","content":"A new rumor suggests a Predator could make an appearance in the sequel to Alien: Romulus, possibly setting the stage for a covert return to the Alien vs.
The speculation comes from entertainment journalist Jeff Sneider, who shared the claim on social media and reiterated it during a recent podcast appearance.
While unconfirmed, the rumor aligns with previous comments from Alien: Romulus director Fede Álvarez, who has expressed interest in eventually merging the Alien and Predator franchises.
Notably, Alien: Romulus was filmed in Hungary, at Origo Studios, and with the sequel already in development, it’s possible the production could return to Hungary for continuity and infrastructure.
As the Alien and Predator franchises continue their respective revivals, fans will be watching closely for any signs of a new crossover—and this time, it might come without warning."}]}
